name: Actual
tagline: Actual Budget is a super fast and privacy-focused app for managing your finances. At its heart is the well proven and much loved Envelope Budgeting methodolog
description:
Actual Budget is a super fast and privacy-focused app for managing your finances. At its heart is the well proven and much loved Envelope Budgeting methodolog


_Template derived from caprover/one-click-apps (caprover@bd357c9, Apache-2.0). Default credentials are generated per-app — check the compose environment values._
docker_compose:
services:
  actual:
    image: actualbudget/actual-server:23.8.1-alpine
    volumes:
      - actual-data:/data
    restart: unless-stopped
    ports:
      - 42000:5006
volumes:
  actual-data: null
